title: MCP tool OUTPUT schemas (Agent Atelier)
description: Day-2 MCP contract (PRD §16.1): every tool ships a declared JSON OUTPUT schema, not just inputs. A live response that fails its declared schema FAILS CLOSED (the call errors; nothing proceeds). P1-B VERIFY runs each tool through the MCP Inspector and captures one raw JSON-RPC call as the report-is-not-the-repo proof. image_generate and research_fetch are PINNED verbatim from §16.1; the others are the authored contract grounded in §17 / §11.2 / §12.3 — confirm exact provider field names/limits against live docs at build time (§14.3). Brand values are registry tokens resolved per brand; this contract never changes between brands.

image_generate.$comment: PINNED verbatim from §16.1. Renders NO text (OCR-verified invariant, §11.2).

research_fetch.$comment: PINNED verbatim from §16.1. Sanitized, allowlist-bound retrieval + grounding.

caption_compose.$comment: Authored contract, grounded in §11.2. Text-free image in, brand type composited; OCR check; scrim behind every line; channel aspect ratio, short edge >= 1080px.

ocr_text_free.description: true = source image carried no baked glyphs (invariant, §11.2)

drive.$comment: Authored contract, grounded in §12.3 byte-serving + §17 Asset. byte_url must serve raw image/* 200, not a Drive viewer page.

byte_url.description: raw byte-serving URL; validated image/* 200 at publish (§12.3)

sheets.$comment: Authored contract, grounded in §12.2. Orchestrator is the sole writer of derived status; ledger/audit are append-only.

instagram_publish.$comment: Authored contract, grounded in §12.3 + §17 QueueItem. The only launch adapter. Idempotent via the publish-once guard keyed by piece_id.

instagram_caption_edit.$comment: Authored contract, §14.3 post-publication correction. No new publish authority; behind the §14.4 checkpoint.

instagram_delete.$comment: Authored contract, §14.3 post-publication take-down. No new publish authority; behind the §14.4 checkpoint.

handoff_export.$comment: Authored contract, §12.3.1 + §17 HandoffBundle. Packaging + validation only; adds NO publish authority.

notify.$comment: Authored contract, §16.2 + §17 Notification. See notify_payload.schema.json for the INPUT payload.

calendar.$comment: Authored contract, optional tool. Schedule slots.
